name: workbench.storyboard.planner
description: Decompose a 200–500 character story into 6–12 ordered storyboard shots and lay them out on the generation canvas with linear edges.

inputs.name: story
inputs.description: A short story (roughly 200–500 Chinese characters) to be turned into a storyboard.

examples.title: Urban late-night scene
examples.description: Turn a 6-paragraph story about a late commute into 6 cinematic shots.
